title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Projects collection supports create, edit, and delete with list rows and derived counts updating from shared application state
At least two distinct views or interaction modes are switchable without full page navigation
Domain state beyond CRUD is implemented (filters, status/priority/mode, or equivalent) and recomputes visible results from the shared collection
Renders visible validation feedback when create is submitted with empty required fields, and the collection count does not increase
Projects list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
NgRx holds projects, command history, theme, and mode — shared across components
Implemented with Angular, NgRx, and Angular Material; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist projects, theme, or history
Manages the projects collection only in component-local component state rather than NgRx
Terminal-over-wallpaper composition with CLI and Projects Board density remains tool-like
Empty projects state is visually present when the collection is empty
Replaces the terminal with a static marketing portfolio and no command shell
Required hover animations are present; boot/CLI reveal and mode switches animate as specified
CLI/Board mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover washes on project rows or chrome so the terminal feels static on pointer hover
